name: cut-line
description: 2D cut-line settings for FLAC2D zone plot items (clips the displayed zones along a line). Validated against 'plot item create zone cut-line ?' in FLAC2D 9.0.
syntax: plot item create zone cut-line width <integer>

keywords.description: Width of the cut-line in pixels.

examples: plot item create zone cut-line width 2
notes: FLAC2D cuts use a 2D line geometry via 'cut-line width <int>'.

FLAC3D uses a separate 3D 'cut' keyword (plane geometry) on zone items: 'plot item create zone cut active on type plane origin (x,y,z) normal (nx,ny,nz)'. The 3D form is binary-verified in FLAC3D 9.0 and is NOT accepted by FLAC2D 9.0.
Once the item is created, position the cut line interactively in the FLAC GUI or via 'plot item modify <id> cut-line ...'.
